description: Workspace fixture validating D38's rejection of knowledge-as-core-kind via a Sana-style worked example per D53. Two human-actors (curator + consumer roles) + one agent-actor (kb-agent) compose around a corpus accessed through two adapters (knowledge-retriever + knowledge-writer) and one specialist (knowledge-agent). The sana-knowledge-shape declares actor-requirements {human-actor:{min:1}} (exercising D52 step 2.5 post-projection state validity for the first time in a fixture per D52 §D D-7 forward-bar) + pre-citation / post-corpus-write hooks (impl wired through pre-event-emit / post-event-emit per D47 §B.2 + substrate.py:219 + :249). Manifest actors are ordered curator-1 FIRST so the post-projection state check passes during seeding (after first add: human-actor count = 1, satisfying min=1).
